topProducts.name: Hay, Pasture & Lawn Recovery System with Liquid Biochar - 2.5 Gallon
topProducts.description: Premium 2.5 gallon concentrate with liquid biochar, yucca, humic and fulvic acids, kelp, and beneficial biology for hay fields, pastures, lawns, and turf. Covers up to 2 to 5 acres depending on use rate and conditions.
topProducts.category: hay pasture lawn recovery liquid biochar

topProducts.name: Living Soil Revitalizer - 4 lb Worm Castings & Activated Biochar

topProducts.category: living soil revitalizer worm castings biochar

topProducts.name: Dog Urine Odor Eliminator for Outdoor Surfaces
topProducts.description: Pet-safe outdoor enzyme deodorizer for grass, concrete, patios, kennels, artificial turf, yards, and dog runs. Designed to help remove outdoor pet odors instead of covering them up.
topProducts.category: dog urine odor eliminator outdoor enzyme deodorizer

topProducts.name: Lawn & Soil Recovery System - Liquid Humic & Fulvic Acid with Kelp
topProducts.description: One gallon liquid concentrate with humic acid, fulvic acid, and organic kelp to support lawn health, root development, soil conditioning, nutrient availability, gardens, lawns, and pastures.
topProducts.category: liquid humic fulvic acid kelp lawn soil recovery
